title: Positive flow: Create a new team
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'TEAMDEX' section. | Click on the 'Create a Team' option in the main content area.
expected_result: A new team creation form should appear with fields to input team details.

title: Negative flow: Attempt to create a team without selecting a Pokémon
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'TEAMDEX' section. | Click on the 'Create a Team' option in the main content area. | Attempt to save the team without selecting any Pokémon.
expected_result: An error message should appear indicating that a Pokémon must be selected before creating a team.

title: Boundary validation: Maximum number of Pokémon in a team
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'TEAMDEX' section. | Click on the 'Create a Team' option in the main content area. | Select the maximum number of Pokémon allowed in a team and attempt to save the team.
expected_result: The team should be created successfully with the maximum number of Pokémon.

title: Toggles state: Team name visibility toggle
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'TEAMDEX' section. | Click on the 'Create a Team' option in the main content area. | Toggle the visibility of the team name field and attempt to save the team.
expected_result: The team should be created successfully with the team name field either visible or hidden as per the toggle state.

title: Input validation: Invalid team name
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'TEAMDEX' section. | Click on the 'Create a Team' option in the main content area. | Enter an invalid team name and attempt to save the team.
expected_result: An error message should appear indicating that the team name is invalid.

title: Navigation: Return to previous screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'TEAMDEX' section. | Click on the 'Create a Team' option in the main content area. | Navigate back to the previous screen.
expected_result: The user should be returned to the 'TEAMDEX' screen.

title: Accessibility: Screen reader interaction
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'TEAMDEX' section. | Click on the 'Create a Team' option in the main content area. | Use a screen reader to interact with the screen.
expected_result: The screen reader should provide a clear and accurate description of the elements on the screen.

title: Usability: Team name length limit
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'TEAMDEX' section. | Click on the 'Create a Team' option in the main content area. | Attempt to enter a team name that exceeds the maximum allowed length.
expected_result: The user should receive a notification indicating that the team name is too long.
